title: T-076 — PO actuals Technical review/non-conformance trigger contract
prompt:
# T-076 — PO actuals trigger Technical review/non-conformance

Wire the Technical-side contract for Purchase Order receipt actuals: when receiving records actual supplier, actual price/cost, actual spec version/document, actual allergens or declared attrs that differ from approved Technical master data, create a Technical review/non-conformance event and do not update supplier_specs or items.cost_per_kg directly. Provide an idempotent handler for cross-module event `po.receipt_actual_recorded` with typed variance reasons: SUPPLIER_MISMATCH, PRICE_VARIANCE, SPEC_VERSION_MISMATCH, ALLERGEN_MISMATCH, DECLARED_ATTR_MISMATCH. RED first: event processing creates review rows and leaves master data unchanged.

pipeline_inputs.details: This is a cross-module wiring contract; implement only Technical-side handler/tests if the event bus exists, or a typed service plus integration test seam if purchasing module is not present. Review approval can later call supplier_specs or cost history explicit approval actions. Non-conformance can be an outbox event if 09-QUALITY tables are not present yet. No UI in this task. Non-conformance emission must use the shared contract from T-082 when present; until 09-QUALITY exists, persist/emit the exact outbox event shape defined there.
acceptance_criteria: Given PO actual price exceeds tolerance, when event is processed, then a Technical review/non-conformance is emitted and items.cost_per_kg is unchanged.
Given PO actual supplier differs from approved supplier_spec supplier, then SUPPLIER_MISMATCH is recorded and supplier_specs is unchanged.
Given the same PO event is processed twice, then only one review/non-conformance exists for the idempotency key.
Given review is approved later, then master data changes only through explicit supplier_spec/cost approval action, not inside the event handler.

Given a variance is classified from po.receipt_actual_recorded, then emitted non_conformance.requested payload conforms to T-082 and includes source_event_id, idempotency_key, source_module, entity refs, reason codes and severity.
test_strategy: RED integration test with fixture item, supplier_spec and item_cost_history before handler code.
risk_red_lines: Do not implement purchasing UI or PO module.
Do not update supplier_specs or cost_per_kg inside receipt handler.
Do not emit duplicate non-conformance on event retry.
Do not invent a PO/TO-specific NCR payload that diverges from T-082.
pipeline_inputs.description: Technical-side PO actuals review/non-conformance event handler contract without master-data mutation.
